#  Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Add Tools to Project 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Project Settings', click **Tool Settings**. 
  3. Move the **toggle** ![Icon Toggle On](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5432baecee81bc2745e77688cd124644/7b30429a4c1524f8ad61245b0caddc16/icon-toggle-on.png?fm=webp&h=16) to 'Active' to add the following tools to your project:
     * Timesheets
     * _Optional:_ Daily Log with the Timecard Log


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-unit-quantity-based-budget-setup-guide/assign-default-cost-type/)
[ Enable Labor Productivity ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-unit-quantity-based-budget-setup-guide/enable-labor-productivity/)
title: Resource Tracking And Unit Quantity Based Budget Setup Guide - Add Tools to Project
